summary: P1 Tasks Testing Complete - Kibana Live Preview and Credential Theft Detection. All 31 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with all 6 dashboards working, MITRE ATT&CK heatmap displaying correctly, and live data loading from MongoDB.

issues: Chart width/height warnings in console - known issue from previous iteration, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: GET /api/kibana/status - Returns status with 6 dashboards available
GET /api/kibana/dashboards/{id} - Returns config for all 6 dashboards
GET /api/kibana/live-data/{id} - Returns panel data for all 6 dashboards
GET /api/kibana/live-data/security-overview - Has metric panels with data
GET /api/kibana/live-data/geo-threat-map - Has map data with country/lat/lon/count
GET /api/kibana/export-all - Returns all dashboards in NDJSON
CredentialTheftDetector monitors browser credentials (Chrome, Firefox, Edge)

features: Live Preview tab shows dashboard selector
Each dashboard has Export and Preview buttons

data_displayed: Threats by Severity pie chart (critical 9, high 13, medium 1)
Threats by Type pie chart (ai_agent 11, malware 5, botnet 1, phishing 1, ids_alert 5)
Recent Critical Events table with real data
Tactics: Initial Access, Execution, Persistence, Privilege Escalation, Defense Evasion

critical_code_review_comments: Kibana Live Preview uses MongoDB data instead of Elasticsearch (ES not available) - this is expected and documented
MITRE heatmap uses synthetic data for visualization - this is expected and documented
All 6 dashboards are available and working: security-overview, threat-intelligence, geo-threat-map, mitre-attack, endpoint-security, playbook-analytics
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_kibana_live_preview.py - Created comprehensive test suite for P1 features

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all dashboards load and display data correctly)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 tasks complete. Kibana Live Preview works with MongoDB data (no Elasticsearch required). All 6 dashboards available with live visualizations. MITRE ATT&CK heatmap shows tactics/techniques matrix. Credential Theft Detector in advanced_agent.py has 37 tools, monitors LSASS access, browser credentials, SSH keys. CLI --credential-scan option works.

mocked_integrations.note: Kibana Live Preview uses MongoDB data instead of Elasticsearch (ES not available in this environment). The visualizations are rendered with custom React components instead of actual Kibana embeds. MITRE heatmap uses synthetic data for visualization.
